title: Berkley Jam
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
'''Berkley Jam''' was the publisher of the ''[[Star Wars: Junior Jedi Knights]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Knights]]'' novel series with the other publisher of the books being [[Berkley Boulevard|Boulevard]].

==Products==
===Young Jedi Knights===
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Shadow]]''
**''[[Young Jedi Knights: Heirs of the Force]]''
**''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy]]''
**''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Lost Ones]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Lightsabers]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Darkest Knight]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Under Siege]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Diversity Alliance]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Bounty]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Crisis at Crystal Reef]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Return to Ord Mantell]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Trouble on Cloud City]]''

===Junior Jedi Knights===
*''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]''
